property.caption: Image attribute
property.description: The image to crop. The cropped result is saved back to it.

property.caption: Crop shape
property.description: Shape of the crop. Circle masks the corners.

property.caption: Aspect ratio
property.description: Locks the crop proportions. Free lets the user resize freely.

property.caption: Custom aspect width
property.description: Width side of the ratio (e.g. 3 in 3:2). Used when Aspect ratio is Custom.

property.caption: Custom aspect height
property.description: Height side of the ratio (e.g. 2 in 3:2). Used when Aspect ratio is Custom.

property.caption: On crop
property.description: Runs each time the crop is auto-applied to the image attribute.

property.caption: Canvas max width (px)
property.description: Maximum on-screen width of the crop area. The image scales down to fit; the canvas wraps the rendered image, so smaller crops produce a smaller canvas with no blank gaps. Does not change the saved image size.

property.caption: Canvas max height (px)
property.description: Maximum on-screen height of the crop area. The image scales down to fit; the canvas wraps the rendered image, so smaller crops produce a smaller canvas with no blank gaps. Does not change the saved image size.

property.caption: Show preview
property.description: Show a live thumbnail of the current crop next to the canvas.

property.caption: Preview width (px)
property.description: Width of the preview thumbnail.

property.caption: Preview height (px)
property.description: Height of the preview thumbnail.

property.caption: Resizable handles
property.description: Let the user resize the selection by dragging its corners.

property.caption: Enable zoom
property.description: Master switch for zooming. When off, the slider and mouse-wheel zoom are disabled and the image stays at 1×.

property.caption: Show zoom slider
property.description: Show the zoom slider below the crop area. Turn off to keep mouse-wheel zoom while hiding the slider.

property.caption: Mouse wheel zoom
property.description: Whether the mouse wheel zooms the image. "On (hold Ctrl)" keeps page scroll working.

property.caption: Minimum zoom
property.description: Smallest zoom level. 1 = image fits the canvas. Below 1 lets the user zoom out further.

property.caption: Maximum zoom
property.description: Largest zoom level. 4 means up to 4× the canvas size. Must be greater than Minimum zoom.

property.caption: Output format
property.description: File format. PNG keeps transparency; JPEG produces smaller files.

property.caption: JPEG quality (0.0 - 1.0)
property.description: JPEG compression. Higher = sharper and larger. Ignored for PNG.

property.caption: Output size
property.description: Resolution of the saved crop. Original is sharpest; Viewport matches the on-screen canvas size.
